diagrams.title: File System Mounting Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the complete flow of mounting a file system from storage device to directory tree integration
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how physical storage becomes accessible through the hierarchical directory structure

diagrams.title: Fstab Entry Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of six fields in /etc/fstab configuration file with example values
diagrams.purpose: Learning the correct format and meaning of each field in fstab for automatic mounting configuration

diagrams.title: Bind Mount vs Regular Mount Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing how bind mount duplicates directory at new location vs regular mount attaching device
elements: Regular Mount: Device -> Mount Point (replaces/hides original content)
Bind Mount: Directory -> New Location (same content, two access paths)
Visual showing single inode shared between both paths in bind mount
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference between mounting a device and binding a directory for containerization and development workflows
